Override.entitydescription.physicoriumammobox: A heavy box of coilgun ammo, utilizing Physicorium as its main material. The best punch and stopping power you can stick in a coilgun shell.
Override.entitydescription.chaingunammobox: A heavy box of ammo for the chaingun. Inexpensive and good for spray-and-pray tactics.
Override.entitydescription.chaingunammoboxshredde: A heavy box of ammunition for the chaingun. Easily shreds through flesh and armor alike, but is less compact and more material-hungry.
Override.entitydescription.flakcannonammoboxphysi: A backbreakingly heavy box of ammo for the flak cannon, utilizing Physicorium as its main material. Moderate spread, exceptional raw damage.
Override.entitydescription.flakcannonammoboxgravi: A heavy box of dementonite-based ammo for the flak cannon, loaded with contact-activated shells capable of generating a short-lived singularity.
Override.entitydescription.gravityshell: A dementonite-based shell for the railgun, capable of generating a short-lived singularity on contact.
